things.name: Red Sea Snorkelling & Diving
things.description: World-class coral reefs with colourful fish and the famous underwater military tank

things.name: Wadi Rum Desert
things.description: 40-minute drive to the UNESCO moonscape desert for jeep safaris and Bedouin camping

things.name: Aqaba Fort & Museum
things.description: Early 16th-century fort built by Mamluk sultans with the Hashemite coat of arms

things.name: Aqaba Marine Park
things.description: Protected marine reserve with 110 species of coral and 1,000 species of fish

things.name: South Beach (Al-Ghandour)
things.description: Long sandy beach with clear shallow water suitable for swimming and watersports

things.name: Ayla Old Town
things.description: Early Islamic city from the 7th century - the oldest Islamic city in the region

things.name: Aqaba Flagpole
things.description: One of the world's tallest flagpoles at 130m, visible from Israel, Egypt and Saudi Arabia

things.name: Glass-bottom Boat Trips
things.description: View coral and marine life without getting wet on glass-bottom boat tours

things.name: King Hussein Bin Talal Mosque
things.description: Modern mosque on the waterfront with a distinctive minaret and marble interior

things.name: Aqaba Waterfront Promenade
things.description: Seafront corniche with restaurants and views across to Israel, Egypt and Saudi Arabia
